# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.

Write secure code.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: service-a
  labels:
    app: service-a
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-a
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: service-a
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: service-a
        image: your-registry/service-a:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
        securityContext:
          runAsUser: 1001
          runAsGroup: 1001
          fsGroup: 1001

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: service-b
  labels:
    app: service-b
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-b
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: service-b
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: service-b
        image: your-registry/service-b:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8081
        securityContext:
          runAsUser: 1001
          runAsGroup: 1001
          fsGroup: 1001

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: service-c
  labels:
    app: service-c
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: service-c
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: service-c
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: service-c
        image: your-registry/service-c:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8082
        securityContext:
          runAsUser: 1001
          runAsGroup: 1001
          fsGroup: 1001
